hero.hero_overview: Angela is a versatile support roamer in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB) known for her map-wide presence, excellent utility, and strong defensive capabilities. Her effectiveness relies heavily on team coordination and game sense rather than mechanical skill.
hero.hero_strength: Strong Utility and Crowd Control: Angela provides consistent healing with her first skill, Love Waves, and can immobilize enemies with her second skill, Puppet-on-a-String, after a short delay
hero.hero_weakness: Requires Team Coordination: To maximize her potential, Angela needs a team that understands how to play with her, particularly allies who can capitalize on her support and positioning.

hero.hero_overview: An android with the world's most moving stories into her heart, a creation meant for helping others. Artificial human made by the founder of Laboratory 1718, Dr. Baker. Angela is a support type hero with healing, crowd control and shielding skills. She can support teammates with her shield and heal them, as well as slowing enemies with her crowd control.
hero.hero_strength: With the new skill adjustment angela can now be everywhere in the map with her ultimate. She can now support her allies in need faster, providing them with shield in fight, healing low hp allies. She can be played with both sustain type and burst type hero making her compatible with various heroes.

data.recommend: You should help and support all of the teammates to win the match.

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Angela can ult onto them when they dive, shielding them and adding CC, letting them burst safely
Turns assassins into unkillable threats in mid-game skirmishes.

counters.counter_desc:
Angela relies on positioning and timing. Helcurt punishes poor positioning with sudden engages.
Even if Angela ults to attach to an ally, Helcurt can target and burst her before the tether or healing makes a difference.

dominants.dominant_desc: Always keep track of your allies flicker/retrys/ult cooldowns before using Heartguard. Angela's ult is game-changing when synced with burst combos.

emblems.emblem_desc: This is Angela's core emblem because it amplifies her healing and shield power, boosts her mana regen, and gives utility that perfectly fits her playstyle

equips.equip_desc:
This build ensures Angela can:
Stay alive longer, even when targeted.
Reduce enemy sustain (Dominance Ice).
Heal & shield allies more effectively (Oracle).
Spam ult more frequently (Fleeting Time).

She becomes a sustain-heavy support that can fully commit to protecting allies while being hard to burst down.

hero.hero_overview: Angela is a doll-like support hero created by Dr. Baker. She was designed with a pure heart and the ability to spread love and kindness. Her playful yet caring nature is reflected in her skills, which focus on healing, shielding, and enhancing her allies.
hero.hero_strength: Revamped Angela is now a top-tier support with stronger heals, smoother CC, better scaling, and global presence. She excels in teamfight sustainability, map-wide assistance, and disabling enemies while protecting the main damage dealer.
hero.hero_weakness: Struggles against burst assasins like Gusion, Hayabusa, or Ling can easily dive and eliminate her before she contributes much.

spell.spell_desc:
Use Sprint when being targeted by assassins to maintain distance while continuously slowing them with your 2nd skill (Puppet-on-a-String).
Great for repositioning during team fights before or after using your ultimate.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Early Game: Stick with your core to protect and help secure buffs or objectives.

Mid Game: Start rotating to help side lanes when needed. Look out for Turtle fights use teleport if needed.

Late Game: Stay behind your carry, and be ready to use your Ultimate to clutch save or join a fight across the map.


Watch the mini-map constantly to find the best moment to Ult an ally.

Ping before using Ultimate so your teammate knows you're coming.

Don't waste Ult on tanky allies unless they're diving or holding the front line in a crucial fight.

Position well when not using Ultimate—Angela is very squishy if caught alone.
dominants.dominant_title: In the early game, prioritize leashing your core jungler and avoid getting killed. If you die early, you lose gold and give the enemy an advantage—especially if it's their core who gets the kill.

emblems.emblem_desc:
"Inspire" grants Angela a 5% cooldown reduction for her Ultimate and other skills.

"Bargain Hunter" is my top recommendation for Angela. It helps her buy items at 95% of their base price, allowing her to build items faster and more efficiently.

You can also use "Pull Yourself Together" if you want to prioritize reducing your battle spell cooldowns even further.

"Temporal Reign" is great for Angela, especially when using her Ultimate. Her Ult is crucial for supporting teammates—especially if your core has an aggressive playstyle and is confident in securing kills. Supporting them this way not only increases your assists but also helps reduce the cooldown of your Ultimate even more.

equips.equip_desc:
Demon Boots: Helps Angela maintain mana for sustained casting during the game.

Temporal Reign + Fleeting Time: This is a core cooldown-reduction combo. If you have an ally with strong early-game damage, supporting them with this combo can greatly reduce your Ultimate's cooldown. Temporal Reign already shortens cooldowns, and when combined with Fleeting Time, it becomes even more effective.

Flask of the Oasis: Provides a shield to your allies and grants an additional shield when you use your Ultimate, increasing survivability in team fights.

Skill 2 + Ice Queen Wand: A perfect combo to slow enemies, preventing them from escaping. Follow up with Skill 1 to deal more damage and further stack the slow effect.

Glowing Wand: Useful against heroes with strong healing. Alternatively, you can switch to "Dominance Ice", which offers similar anti-healing effects. It also reduces enemy attack speed, making it a great option when you're supporting an ally using your Ultimate, especially against high DPS enemies.

Immortality: Best used in the late game, particularly when respawn timers are longer. It gives Angela a second chance to return to the fight or escape safely.

hero.hero_overview: Angela is a support mage who helps her team with healing, shielding, and crowd control. Her ultimate skill, Heartguard, allows her to attach to an ally anywhere on the map and protect them. She is strong in team fights and is best used in the roaming role to support the marksman or jungler. Angela works well in coordinated team play.
hero.hero_strength:
High Utility: Angela provides healing, shields, and slows, which are great in team fights.

Global Support: Her ultimate can save teammates from across the map.

Good Early Game: She can poke enemies and protect her ally in the lane.

Safe Farming: She does not need a lot of gold and can build support items early.

Great Synergy: Angela works well with mobile heroes like Lukas, Alice , Barats , and Yu Zhong.
hero.hero_weakness:
Squishy: She can be easily killed if caught alone.

Team Dependent: She needs a strong teammate to attach to and cannot carry alone.

Positioning Matters: If she uses her ultimate late or in the wrong spot, it can fail.

Weak Against CC: If her host is stunned or silenced, she becomes useless.

Low Damage: She does not deal much damage and can fall off in the late game.

spell.spell_desc: Your main priority is to support the core hero first. If the gold laner needs help or is being harassed, you can rotate quickly and safely using this spell. Use this spell during Turtle or Lord fights, or when there is a chance to help secure a tower. Most Angela users commonly use Sprint, Flameshot, or Revitalize, but this is a secret battle spell strategy that many players do not know.

dominants.dominant_desc: Stick to the jungler, help him reach lvl 4 fast then you go to help the marksman and try to take down the tower of the enemy.

Make sure you have good rotation help the exp and mid too don't focus only on the jungler and marksman and avoid engaging in any fight solo stick to teammates. Make sure to help with getting turtle or lord.

Use your ults wisely, use them to help teammates escape or fight. Usually when choosing who to use your ult pick i pick the jungler if not pick someone with full build and you know can make damage sometimes it could even be a mage.

equips.equip_desc: I found these equipments helpful especially the second which protects teammates and the fourth that reduces the cooldown time and in late game it makes a big difference.

hero.hero_overview: Generally speaking, Angela is a nice support hero. Although many assume that she is only a girl's hero (which is true to some extent) she still makes a big difference in the game if you have a nice jungler and good teammates. Her skills too are important and playing her is actually pretty interesting and fun.
hero.hero_strength: As for the build, I'm still trying new items and trying all types of builds, emblems too. Speaking from my own point of view, angela is best suitable for a strong jungler or mostly exp. Because by the time she gets her ultimate, these too have already farmed and could be engaging in big fights. Also, even though Angela is not a tank, her presence with the jungler in the first minutes of the game makes a big difference. After helping the jungler, you can go immediately to the gold lane and secure the first tower, help the marksman then help the fighter (many think that exp laners do not need roamer but i think the opposite, every lane needs support that is why you need to rotate pretty well). I believe each hero's strength lies in their builds first then in their skills. For instance, Angela's ult helps a lot whether you want your teammate to escape with low hp or to help your teammate in a fight. Rotation too is important.
hero.hero_weakness: In the early game, it is a bit hard to farm fast since you're simply using  a support hero and some items do make a difference in a fight. Being alone does not help. You have to be with someone or you will die because angela simply cannot do much when it comes to self defense. She could stay alive for some time but if no teammate comes by, she's dead. Sometimes, in the early game, the ultimate cooldown time takes lots of time. One last thing, when you want to use your ult on someone you have to be far from enemies or hiding in a bush or the ult will be interrupted or cancelled or simply they kill you while you are doing it.

spell.spell_desc: I would say choose between flicker and flame shot. With the first you can escape enemies. With the second, if you are a good sniper, you can get kills when the enemy is low on hp or you can push them away and escape.

hero.hero_overview:
Background: A kind-hearted android created for support and healing.

Role: Support/Mage, providing healing, shields, and crowd control.

Farming: Use roam items, focus on assists, and avoid taking farm.

Playstyle: Stay behind allies, poke enemies, and use Heartguard wisely.
hero.hero_strength: idk
hero.hero_weakness:
Lane & Farming: Low damage output, relies on teammates for kills.

Team Fights: Vulnerable if caught alone, weak against burst damage.

Early/Mid/Late Game: Weak early game alone, mid-game depends on team positioning, and late-game struggles if teammates are behind.

Worst Traits: Squishy, easily countered by anti-healing items, and ultimate is useless if teammates misposition.
